description: EOS gate surface manifest. Classifies paths in PR diffs as cross-boundary surface (requiring fleet probe before merge) or exempt (no probe). Loaded by .github/workflows/pr-fleet-probe.yml at gate-evaluation time.

skill.description: Slash-command skills. Canonical source is .claude/commands/; .agents/skills/ and .gemini/commands/ are generated by sync-commands.sh. Probe must verify the new/changed skill is invocable from a fresh Claude session on a fleet machine.

mcp-tool.description: MCP tool source. Built into dist/ at postinstall and loaded by the launcher. Probe must verify the new/changed tool registers and is callable from a fresh crane vc session on a fleet machine.

fleet-artifact.description: Scripts the fleet executes during bootstrap, sync, or session lifecycle. Touching these can break boot on every machine. Probe runs the script in --check or --dry-run mode against the PR branch on a fleet machine.

config-canon.description: Configuration files consumed at boot or by the launcher. Drift here breaks every fleet machine on next sync. Probe verifies the file parses cleanly and downstream consumers boot successfully.

boot-config.description: Launcher and session-bootstrap source. Touching these means every new session boots through different code. High-risk; always fleet-probe.

app-data-seam.description: Producer->consumer data seams: read paths whose failure mode is rendering honest-empty because the producer is dead (the SS UI-renders-empty class). Worker endpoints reading D1, Astro pages/loaders, route handlers. NOT a CI-probeable deployment artifact — covered by the relevance+aliveness verify gate (Layer 4c + pr-verify-gate), which requires a live_state/fresh_process crane_verify naming the seam with non-empty output. Per-venture adoption: add the venture's read-path globs here.

docs-only.description: Markdown documentation outside the .claude/commands/ skill canon and outside .agents/skills/. These do not change agent behavior on the fleet; no probe needed.

tests-only.description: Test files. Run by CI but not by the fleet at runtime.

build-info.description: Generated build-info files; updated by the build pipeline, not authored.

ci-internal.description: GitHub Actions workflows are CI-internal — they do not run on fleet machines.

skill-invoke.description: On the probe machine, start a non-interactive Claude session in the PR-checkout dir, list available slash commands, and confirm the new/changed skill name is present. For modified existing skills, verify frontmatter schema validity (run skill-review).

mcp-tool-list.description: On the probe machine, run npm ci + npm run build for crane-mcp, then start the MCP server and list registered tools. Verify the new/changed tool appears and responds to a no-op invocation.

script-check.description: On the probe machine, run the script with --check or --dry-run as appropriate. Exit 0 = pass.

config-parse-and-boot.description: Parse the config file with the appropriate parser (JSON.parse for *.json), then boot the consumer (crane vc) and verify it reaches ready state without error.

session-boot.description: On the probe machine, build crane-mcp from PR branch, start a fresh crane vc session, run /sos, verify session reaches ready state.

verify-evidence.description: No CI/fleet probe. The seam is proven by a live_state/fresh_process crane_verify record that names a changed file and whose output shows data (not []/empty). Enforced by the verify-coverage gate (Layer 4c, EOS-time) and pr-verify-gate.yml (PR-time).
